features.title: Implement solution for issue #119
features.description: Fix automated AI Harness system to handle duplicate PR scenarios. The system failed to process issue #115 because it attempted to create a PR for a branch that already has an existing PR.

details.summary: The automated AI Harness system failed to process issue #115 because it attempted to create a pull request for a branch that already has an existing PR. This requires manual investigation and potential automation improvements to handle duplicate PR scenarios.
details.root_cause: Automation does not check for existing PRs before attempting to create new ones
details.solution: Implement PR existence check and proper error handling in the automation workflow

overall_approach: 1. First investigate the existing PR for issue #115 to understand the current state. 2. Determine if the existing PR is valid and can be used, or if it needs to be closed/replaced. 3. Update the automation logic to check for existing PRs before attempting to create new ones, preventing this error in the future.
potential_risks: Losing work if the existing PR is closed prematurely
Automation creating duplicate branches or PRs in the future
Inconsistent state between issues and PRs if not handled properly
